name: FAT NECROSIS OF BREAST
definition: TRAUMATIC LIPID CYST = OIL CYST nonsuppurative saponification of fat by tissue lipase ← local destruction of fat cells with nonsuppurative panniculitis with recurrent bouts of inflammation = areas of fat necrosis,

demographics.Etiology: direct external trauma (seat belt injury), lumpectomy, reduction mammoplasty, implant
demographics.Histo: cavity with oily material surrounded by "foam cells" (= lipid-laden macrophages)

dominant_finding: signal intensity nearly isointense to fat
distribution: round lesion with central SI of fat (in oil cyst)
discriminating_features: early: ill-defined irregular spiculated dense mass
later: well-circumscribed mass with translucent areas at center (= homogeneous fat density of
occasionally curvilinear / eggshell calcification in wall
fine spicules of low density vary with projection

general: early: ill-defined irregular spiculated dense mass
later: well-circumscribed mass with translucent areas at center (= homogeneous fat density of
occasionally curvilinear / eggshell calcification in wall
fine spicules of low density vary with projection
US: hypo- / anechoic mass with ill- / well-defined margins ± acoustic shadowing
complex cyst with mural nodules / echogenic bands
MR: signal intensity nearly isointense to fat
round lesion with hyperintense fat signal (oil cyst)
localized ill-defined area of moderate enhancement + continuous postinitial increase (=
rim-enhancement / no enhancement in late lesion / oil cyst
ill-defined hyperintense area (= reactive edema of fresh lesion)
round lesion with central SI of fat (in oil cyst)
